reason: The public Flywheel site is a static Vercel surface for v0.2. The current release contract needs public contact routing, not browser-verified message delivery. Adding a form provider or owned API route now would add secrets, deployment shape changes, and provider policy before the broader ZestStream intake system is chosen.
future_upgrade_trigger: When ZestStream chooses a shared intake provider or owned intake API, reopen this as a fleet-wide contact-delivery pack rather than a Flywheel-only form patch.
